texto: This wobbly worldhost to insects and lintand a thousand pithy waysto feel unserious each minuteIt brings abouta great softening of the mind, likethe clouded edges of sea glass (thisfilter you could download and apply)A poultice or an opiate,rigidly individual. Aloneand erasing sentences to splinters.(Poem No. 5)
explicacao: Citação de Erin J. Watson sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This wobbly worldhost to insects and lintand a thousand pithy waysto feel unserious each minuteIt…” articula reflexao, insects, vida em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como vida e mind.
